response.overview: Showcases forgotten artist David Oxtoby, friend and contemporary of David Hockney and the one with the more promising career (six one-man shows while still a student.) While Hockney currently enjoys a massive retrospective in Paris, the other David languishes in a care home. This film offers a rare encounter with Oxtoby himself, and the rock’n’roll stars and their dangerously exciting music that he captured so brilliantly on canvas.
response.title: Oxtoby
